[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A black-and-white pencil-style portrait drawing shows a person wearing a face mask, with long, wind-swept hair and wire-like lines filling the background.

Main Subject:
The image focuses on a close-up bust portrait of a person shown from the shoulders up, facing slightly to the viewer’s left. The person has long, messy hair that extends outward in many strands, and they wear a light-colored face mask covering the nose and mouth. The eyes are visible above the mask, with an intense, detailed linework effect and high contrast around the eyes and cheek area. One ear is visible on the right side of the image (viewer’s right). The clothing is unclear, but the shoulders and upper chest are sketched with dark shading and layered lines.

Setting:
The background is a dark, near-black field with scattered, thin, straight line patterns that resemble fine scratches or wire-like strokes. There is no outdoor or indoor setting visible beyond the abstract background.

Visual Details:
The portrait is rendered in monochrome with dense crosshatching and thin contour lines. The hair appears as many light strands against the dark background, creating a sense of motion and dispersion. The face mask shows a grid-like texture and creases drawn with fine strokes. Lighting appears dramatic and directional, emphasizing the contrast between bright highlights on the hair and face features and the darker, shaded areas of the neck and shoulders. The camera angle is straight-on to slightly angled, with the person centered in the frame.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
This image is a monochrome, pencil-like drawing of a masked person with long hair rendered in many detailed strands. The background is abstract and dark, filled with thin line patterns that complement the sketch style.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
